generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign tech for our defense systems? That's a risk we can't afford. Building our own strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about ensuring our national security isn't held hostage by geopolitical tensions. Every dollar invested in our own capabilities is a dollar protecting our freedoms. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
